phrases.intent_en: Which way to the souvenir shop
phrases.cultural_note: Souvenir shops are often near exits or in central nave areas of cathedrals.

likely_response.translation_en: In the nave or at the exit.

responses.english: In the nave or at the exit.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Wo kann ich einen Audioguide ausleihen?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guide rentals are commonly handled at visitor information points.

likely_response.translation_en: Right at the entrance on the right.

responses.english: Right at the entrance on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Shrine of Three Kings open now
phrases.cultural_note: The Shrine is typically accessible during cathedral opening hours unless restricted for services.

phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Eingang zur Domschatzkammer?
phrases.cultural_note: The Treasury entrance is separate from the main cathedral entrance.

likely_response.local: Der Eingang ist an der Südseite.
likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is on the south side.

responses.english: The entrance is on the south side.
responses.french: Der Eingang ist an der Südseite.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the tower ticket counter
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Schalter für Turmbesteigungstickets?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket counters for tower climbs are typically located at the base of the accessible tower.
